32.reason: Potential index out of bounds: after incrementing i, if i is at the last character, content.charAt(i) will throw StringIndexOutOfBoundsException.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  Potential index out of bounds: after incrementing i, if i is at the last character, content.charAt(i) will throw StringIndexOutOfBoundsException.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException: When '&' is the last character in the input, after incrementing i, content.charAt(i) will be out of bounds.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Possible IndexOutOfBoundsException when i is at end of content
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Missing bounds check (i < content.length()) before accessing charAt(i), which causes IndexOutOfBoundsException if '&' is the last character

54.reason: [Same issue: increments i before bounds check, can cause exception or skip next character incorrectly]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Same issue: increments i before bounds check, can cause exception or skip next character incorrectly]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Unconditionally increments i before checking bounds, causing IndexOutOfBoundsException if '|' is at EOF, and skips the next character when handling the error case.

57.reason: Unconditionally increments i before checking bounds, causing IndexOutOfBoundsException if '/' is at EOF.

50.reason: Incorrectly increments line count here; the main loop will also process the trailing '\n' and increment line again, causing double counting.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Incorrectly increments line count here; the main loop will also process the trailing '\n' and increment line again, causing double counting.

193.reason: Causes double line increment because the outer loop will also increment line when it processes the '\n' character in the next iteration
